title: Inside Kendall Jenner's Home Closet | Vogue
description:
Vogue France cover star Kendall Jenner invites us into her personal closet for an exclusive tour. Kendall's highly organized and color-coordinated closet is filled with fabulous pieces from Gucci, Hermès, The Row, Phoebe Philo, Dior, Prada, and Valentino, as well as select hand-me-downs from Kris Jenner and Kim Kardashian.

The highlight of the closet is a floral Louis Vuitton carryall designed by the late Virgil Abloh—a stunning piece from the Spring/Summer 2020 collection that appears to be
